title: Assistant Purchaser
description:
Responsibilities

  1. Ensure proper and complete closure of all Materials. Requisitions including assist on Process Material Requisitions from sites.
  2. Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of procurement transactions including Vendor Information, Delivery Order, Invoices and Purchase Order,
  3. Support projects team and contracts dept in sourcing for specify materials and equipment.
  4. Prepare job site and purchasers petty cash claims, including handle petty cash including bank reconcile for the payment transaction.
  5. Liaise with vendors to obtain quotes, negotiate terms, and facilitate the procurement process.
  6. Verify delivery order / invoice quantity and rate with Purchase Order.
  7. Maintain and update the approved supplier list in accordance to company's ISO procedure.
  8. Assist on Monitor, maintain and update status and allocation of assets (machinery and equipment), including monitor maintenance schedule, servicing, calibration for machinery or equipment.
  9. Evaluating external vendors, contractors, and service providers performance developing and managing long term ethical relationships with supply chain.
  10. Provide support when Internal and External Audit
  11. Liaise with finance department and vendors to resolve discrepancies such as price, quality, delivery, or payment issues, if any.
  12. Others duties as assigned by superiors.

Qualifications

  • Minimum of 2 years’ experience in purchasing
  • Able to work under pressure and fast-paced environment
  • 5.5 workdays
  • Diploma in Logistic or related field
  • Proficiency in English, and Chinese as it facilitates smoother communication with suppliers.
  • Familiar in finance system/software
  • Willing to learn

postedCompany.description: Starting a new company is always a challenge. However, nothing builds a services company better  than understanding clients’ needs and requirements, and fulfilling them right on time, on target with  value-for-money quality product that goes above and beyond expectation. Such is not a myth but a reality  for JAD Solutions Pte Ltd: a Mechanical and Electrical Engineering company that focuses on the healthcare  profession, bio-medical industry and petrochemical research facilities from providing consultancy,  integration of components, installation, testing, commissioning and the final accreditation process.  Started by Mr Damiian Lee in 2007 and initially established as a one-man operation located at Cecil Street,  it started as a dealer for BONPET automatic fire-extinguishers. Year 2009 saw its metamorphosis as it is  now: an enterprise that specialises in multi-discipline environmental control solutions that include  products and vast range of services such as installation and construction in laboratory, hospital isolation &  protection ward design & construction, turnkey projects for chemical, biological and vivarium laboratory  up to bio-safety level 3, testing and commissioning of laboratory facilities, laboratory ACMV & controls  maintenance, amongst others. Beginning in a mere 300 square feet premise, the young company has  since outgrown its previous compound and moved its business to a new location, currently housing both  the expanded operations and increased manpower of over 60 staff.  What sets JAD Solutions apart from the others in the industry, and thus convincing potential clients with  an impeccable impression, is their quality after-sales service and on schedule delivery. Their ability to craft  unique loyalty programmes, thus catering to their specific customers’ profiles, which includes  maintenance and updating services that use the latest technology and processes with continuous  research and development programmes puts them on par with industrial players in the international  arena. This in turn builds customers’ faith and trust in the company, allowing them to provide professional  and expert advice to their clients, creating a positive circle.  In its quest to be the leader as an agent in the critical environment installation industry of international  standards, harnessing innovative ideas in products and designs, JAD Solutions sees itself focusing on  expanding their establishment by building a firm foundation for the business framework and then growing  their products and services in the near future. However, through Damiian’s commitment and dedication,  the company is set to be the trailblazer with its innovative products and cutting edge designs.
postedCompany.name: JAD SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
